title: Incidental powers
doc_html:
§2824.  Incidental powers

The governing authority may do all things necessary to carry out the purposes and provisions of R.S. 33:2821 through R.S. 33:2823.
doc_text:
§2824.  Incidental powers
The governing authority may do all things necessary to carry out the purposes and provisions of R.S. 33:2821 through R.S. 33:2823.
